seoTitle: Chillingollah vs Chiltern — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Chillingollah and Chiltern. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Chillingollah and Chiltern.
heading: Chillingollah vs Chiltern — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Chillingollah, Victoria and Chiltern, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Chiltern has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Chillingollah (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Chillingollah or Chiltern safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Chillingollah has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Chiltern scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Chillingollah scores 44/100 for bushfire risk. Chiltern scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Chillingollah or Chiltern?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Chiltern has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
